bead.title: ui-credential-management: issue/list/revoke credentials
bead.acceptance:
- [ ] ui/src/routes/credentials/+page.svelte exists with list + issue modal + revoke
- [ ] ui/src/lib/api.ts has Credential type + listCredentials/issueCredential/revokeCredential
- [ ] Issue modal submits to POST /control/tenants/:id/credentials
- [ ] Response JWT shown ONCE in a copy-to-clipboard dialog
- [ ] Revoke button calls DELETE and refreshes list
- [ ] Navigation link to /credentials in layout
- [ ] bun run check (svelte-check) passes
- [ ] bun test passes (existing + new)
